name: Walrus Store
description: Agent-native blob storage on Walrus with x402 micropayments. Upload bytes, retrieve by id, inspect metadata, and list your blobs.

tools.name: upload
tools.description: Store a blob on Walrus. Content is base64-encoded bytes; optional name and metadata are recorded. Returns the Walrus blob id.

tools.name: retrieve
tools.description: Fetch a blob by its Walrus id. Content is returned base64-encoded.

tools.name: metadata
tools.description: Return recorded metadata for a blob: size, content-type, stored epoch, owner, name and custom metadata.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List blobs uploaded through this server, filtered by owner and/or name prefix, newest first.
